arts.ttl: Europa League a great opportunity for Tottenham – Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: The Europa League is Tottenham’s last chance to salvage a difficult campaign.

arts.ttl: Tottenham handed major triple injury boost as Ange Postecoglou reveals Europa League plan
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou reveals plan as Solanke, Van de Ven and Romero near comebacks

arts.ttl: Tottenham handed major boost with THREE first-team players set to return from injury in this week's Europa League clash with AZ Alkmaar
arts.sum: Tottenham face AZ Alkmaar in the last 16 of a competition they have to win if Postecoglou is to make good on his claim that he never fails to win a trophy in his second season at a club.

arts.ttl: Micky van de Ven decision made as £30m man drops out: Tottenham predicted starting XI v AZ
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will get their Europa League knockout campaign under way on Thursday night when they head to AZ Alkmaar. Spurs will be facing the...

arts.ttl: Injured Kulusevski 'unlikely' to feature for Spurs again until April
arts.sum: Dejan Kulusevski is "unlikely" to feature for Tottenham again until April after suffering a foot injury, says manager Ange Postecoglou.

arts.ttl: Troy Parrott has 'no regrets' over his time at Tottenham - but the 17-goal AZ Alkmaar forward warns he is ready to dent Spurs' Europa League hopes
arts.sum: Parrott, 23, only made four appearances across seven years at Spurs yet has flourished in the Eredivisie with 17 goals in all competitions since joining AZ last summer.

arts.ttl: Team News: AZ Alkmaar vs. Tottenham Hotspur injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between AZ Alkmaar and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Cristian Romero, Micky van de Ven and Dominic Solanke all back for UEFA Europa League clash with AZ Alkmaar clash
arts.sum: Now though, they could all play their part in what is a huge night for us in Alkmaar as we kick-off our Europa League knockout stage campaign with our round of 16 first leg clash at the AFAS Stadion on Thursday night (5.45pm UK). However, Ange Postecoglou has said caution will continue to be exercised in their return to first-team duties.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham among several PL clubs keen on signing £38m forward who's 'one of the best wingers in Europe'
arts.sum: Liverpool, Tottenham Hotspur, Arsenal and Newcastle United are just a few of the clubs said to be keen on Kingsley Coman. All four Premier League...

arts.ttl: Troy Parrott has no regrets over Tottenham exit: 'I look back with a smile'
arts.sum: Former Spurs striker has been a success at new club AZ Alkmaar
